_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after AU Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Processor must not use these data to build profiles unrelated to the agreed services
securely destroy or de-identify data thereafter
pre-briefings may only occur using scripts that mirror the lodged announcement
from 30 days before half-year and full-year results until the close of trading on the day after the announcement
during any period notified by the Company Secretary
offer letters and start dates for a new CFO not yet announced

Processor will treat any non-public information expected to have a material effect on the price or value of Karrinup BioDevices Ltd’s quoted products as market sensitive and “not generally available” within the meaning of the Corporations Act (Cth), including project codenames (e.g., Project Kestrel), unannounced earnings ranges, or terms of a pending placement.

Security and breach: Processor must maintain ISO-27001-aligned controls and notify Karrinup BioDevices Ltd within 48 hours of becoming aware of an eligible data breach, with content sufficient for OAIC notification if required.
